name: Barbell Curl
description: Classic biceps exercise using a barbell for mass and strength building.

name: Dumbbell Curl
description: Unilateral or bilateral curl using dumbbells for balanced biceps development.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
description: Performed on an incline bench to stretch the biceps and increase range of motion.

name: Hammer Curl
description: Curl variation with neutral grip to target brachialis and brachioradialis along with biceps.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Isolation curl performed seated with elbow braced against inner thigh for peak contraction.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Curl performed on a preacher bench to eliminate cheating and isolate the biceps.

name: Cable Curl
description: Uses a cable machine for constant tension throughout the curling motion.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
description: Barbell curl using an EZ-bar to reduce wrist strain while targeting biceps.

name: Spider Curl
description: Performed face-down on an incline bench to maximize biceps contraction at the top.

name: Zottman Curl
description: Combines a supinated curl with a pronated lowering phase to target multiple forearm muscles.

name: Reverse Curl
description: Performed with an overhand grip to emphasize brachialis and forearm extensors.

name: 21s
description: Combines partial reps: 7 bottom half, 7 top half, then 7 full curls for intensity.

name: Drag Curl
description: Barbell curl where elbows travel backward to emphasize the long head of the biceps.

name: Cable Hammer Curl
description: Hammer curl variation using a cable machine for constant tension and forearm engagement.

name: Machine Preacher Curl
description: Preacher curl performed on a dedicated machine for strict form and isolation.
